case_title: 244 CALIFORNIA STREET ASSOCIATES VS. MARSHALL G BEROL et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT BEROL, MARSHALL G DBA BL/SH FINANCIAL
